closure_requirements: Retain step-up or authentication evidence in audit lineage.
Preserve current accountable owner until the missing auth posture is corrected.
notes: Authentication or step-up proof is missing, stale, or incomplete.
rows.retention_boundary: Carries retention_class and artifact_retention_ref when retention/privacy control state is causal; otherwise follows governed failure retention policy.
rows.retry_scheduling_formula: next_retry_at = min(policy_deadline, opened_at + min(bmax, b0 * 2^n) + phase_offset_seconds)
rows.visibility_boundary: Operator-visible typed failure detail; customer-safe projections must be explicitly narrowed by visibility class.
